# Tobias Meixner

> Tobias Meixner is a freelancer from Würzburg, Germany, specialising in
> Google Tag Manager, GA4, Consent Mode v2, and website development for
> small businesses and self-employed professionals.
>
> Tobias Meixner ist Freelancer aus Würzburg, Deutschland, spezialisiert
> auf Google Tag Manager, GA4, Consent Mode v2 und Website-Entwicklung
> für kleine Unternehmen und Selbstständige.

## About / Über mich

Tobias Meixner has been working as a freelancer since February 2026.
Studying E-Commerce. Location: Würzburg, Bavaria, Germany.
Languages: German (native), English.
Specialisations: tracking implementations, website development, SEO basics.

Clients: Gumb AG (GTM/GA4 Tracking Ecosystem), Stefanie Mischka (website).
Technologies: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, GitHub Pages, Google Tag Manager,
Google Analytics 4, Consent Mode v2, Schema Markup, JSON-LD.

## Services / Leistungen

- [Google Tag Manager Setup](/en/services/): Container setup, configuration,
  and management including tags, triggers, and variables
- [GA4 Implementation](/en/services/): Google Analytics 4 setup,
  event tracking, conversion configuration, and reporting
- [Consent Mode v2](/en/services/): GDPR-compliant tracking with
  CMP integration for websites in the DACH region
- [Website Development](/en/services/): Static websites with HTML,
  CSS, and JavaScript, hosted on GitHub Pages
- [Schema Markup](/en/services/): JSON-LD implementation for better
  visibility in Google and AI-powered search

## Digital Products / Digitale Produkte

- [Schema Markup Template Pack](/en/products/schema-markup-template-pack/):
  9 ready-to-use JSON-LD templates for Person, LocalBusiness, Organization,
  WebSite, Service, BlogPosting, BreadcrumbList, AggregateRating, and FAQPage.
  Includes PDF guide and error checklist. ZIP download via Gumroad.
- [Google Tag Manager Beginner Guide](/en/products/gtm-beginner-guide/):
  15-page PDF guide explaining GTM from scratch. Covers tags, triggers,
  variables, GA4 setup, button-click tracking, outbound links, preview mode,
  and the 10 most common beginner mistakes. Download via Gumroad.

## Blog Articles / Blog-Artikel

- [Answer Engine Optimization](/en/blog/answer-engine-optimization/):
  How websites get found in ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews.
  Data-based guide with concrete steps. Updated 2026.
- [Server-Side Tracking 2026](/en/blog/server-side-tracking/):
  Why client-side tracking loses 30-40% of conversions and how
  server-side GTM prevents this. Includes setup guide.
- [Performance Max vs. Advantage+](/en/blog/performance-max-vs-advantage-plus/):
  Comparison of Google and Meta AI campaign types. With ROAS benchmarks
  and a decision guide by budget.

## Projects / Projekte

- [Gumb AG Tracking](/en/projects/): Built a complete GTM/GA4
  tracking ecosystem for the German market.
- [Stefanie Mischka Website](/en/projects/): Developed a complete
  business website.

website tracking GDPR-compliant, JSON-LD templates, GA4 tracking freelancer
